creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sat Sep 21 13:57:30 UTC 2019
New revision: 512493
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/512493

Log:
  New port: multimedia/py-pymediainfo

  This small package is a wrapper around the MediaInfo library.

  It works on Linux, Mac OS X and Windows and is tested with Python
  2.7, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7, PyPy and PyPy3.

  See https://pymediainfo.readthedocs.io/ for more information.

  WWW: https://github.com/sbraz/pymediainfo

  PR:		240602
  Submitted by:	m.ne@gmx.net
  Reviewed by:	koobs

Changes:
  head/multimedia/Makefile
  head/multimedia/py-pymediainfo/
  head/multimedia/py-pymediainfo/Makefile
  head/multimedia/py-pymediainfo/distinfo
  head/multimedia/py-pymediainfo/pkg-descr
